prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 summer fashion lifestyle photograph shot from a low angle against a vivid blue sky with soft white clouds on the left. A young woman with long dark brown hair stands close to the camera wearing an oversized semi-sheer white button-up shirt with a loose collar, visible chest pocket, rolled cuff, and airy translucent fabric glowing in sunlight. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered square soft pixelated blur/mosaic block in warm skin tones. She holds a small bouquet up beside her face in her left hand: exactly 3 visible rose blossoms, consisting of 1 pale pink rose near the top, 1 light pink rose to the right, and 1 coral-red rose in the center, with long green stems extending diagonally down toward the lower left and multiple green leaves catching the light. Use bright natural daylight, fresh summery colors, realistic skin and fabric texture, shallow but clear focus, an aspirational magazine-photo mood, and a clean phone-wallpaper composition. Add the word Summer near the top center in thin elegant white handwritten cursive script. Add a tiny white social-media-style icon and the small text CHAse centered near the bottom edge. Avoid extra people, extra flowers, borders, or clutter.
